rows.label: tev057901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Tsumuji about the caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Tsumuji about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0001
rows.name:
This area has come to depend
on Dorian Caravan of Tsumuji.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Food! Weapons! Materials! Whatever
friends are looking to order, caravan
will find way to obtain and deliver it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0003
rows.name:
No exceptions! Tsumuji caters to every
weirdo friend, whether they are covered
in crimson skin or thick coat of fuzz.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Tsumuji will cater to human
friends as well, but friends
have to show sign of goodwill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Does friend hail from spaceship that
came crashing down on western horizon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmph! Tsumuji cannot allow caravan to
do business with shady customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0010
rows.name:
If friend wants to shop here,
bring Nopon emissary here to
speak on behalf of friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0011
rows.name: Nopon caravans take name of founder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Dorian was truly great leader. Took
lots of guts to venture into wasteland
and start business here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Dorian way braver than old Elder
Nan, who only want to hide like
whiny baby in human city. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Nan want Mumun and Mogugu and Milmil to become
personal aides. Over dead body of Tsumuji!
Lazy, spoiled elder just want servants...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah! Human friend! Now that
friendship treaty is in place,
just say word if anything is needed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Mo? Friend wants help taking out indigens?
Friend is looking for allies in war against
Growth? MmrrrRRRrrrrmmMMmmrrr...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0020
rows.name:
*ahem* Well naturally, Tsumuji and Dorian Caravan
are strong enough to make short work of threats,
but also not want to steal thunder of friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0021
rows.name:
So, uh, instead caravan will look around
here for delicious food to deliver to
friends! No fighting on empty stomach, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Nopon caravans take name
of caravan founder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0023
rows.name:
Dorian was truly great leader. Took
lots of guts to venture into wasteland
and start business here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Tsumuji want to be great leader too,
so Tsumuji has to take good care of
friends Mumun and Mogugu and Milmil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0025
rows.name:
Tsumuji would never pretend world
revolved around self and cause trouble
like certain old spoiled Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hello, friend! Many Nopon set off
fireworks, but none as wild and
spectacular as those of Tsumuji![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Meh heh. Caravan of Tsumuji take great pride
in ancient pyrotechnic firework wizardry handed
down from none other than great Dorian![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Great and mighty Dorian used same
fireworks to frighten off monsters
in this area before starting caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Such bravery! Such wit! Dorian was much
better leader than certain pervy elder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057901_MSG0033
rows.name:
Tsumuji going to work hard
to become type of leader
caravan can follow with pride.[ST:wait ]
